feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Include Workflow tasks in authorization role on productive system
entry.content:
Hello,

we built a new authorization role on the S/4 development system including several workflow tasks.
After transport of the role into our test system, the workflow components were not included in the role anymore and had to be added manually in PFCG.

This is okay for the test system. But our authorizations are strictly limited on the productive system and no one is allowed to change roles on the productive system directly.

How can we achive a transport of the role including the workflow tasks, or is there any other solution to add these to the role?

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: How to restrict both PO line items and additional G/L account amounts in MIRO?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During invoicing with MIRO or app Create Supplier Invoice, if user selected PO line items and additional amount in GL system allowed to post entries. How we can restrict it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Oracle 19c Database to S4 Table data migration using SAP DATA SERVICES
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on a migration project from an Oracle database to an S/4 HANA application system running on AWS. We have successfully set up datastore connections in SAP BODS for both the Oracle DB (datastore name: POFSN) and the S/4 HANA system (datastore name: SW1). Below is a brief overview of the connections:

S/4 HANA SYSTEM (SW1):

ORACLE Database (POFSN)

 

The issue arises when I attempt to drag a table (e.g., ADRC) from the SW1 datastore into the Dataflow in SAP BODS. I am not being given the option to set ADRC as the target table.

Is this process incorrect? What should I check to resolve this issue and ensure that tables from the S/4 HANA system can be used as target tables? 

Additionally, I would appreciate suggestions on other approaches to overwrite tables in S/4 HANA using SAP BODS.

Please let me know if any further information is required.

Thank you!

TAGS
SAP Data Services 
SAP S/4HANA 
Oracle Database

entry.title: Two processing rules would match a bank statement item, what happens then?
entry.content:
Question was raised by a colleague, what would happen if I have two rules in my system, processing rule with id 872 and two conditions, like company code and house bank account. 

And another one with id 873 with two conditions, like company code and external transaction.

Now we import a bank statement, and it contains an item which would fulfills both rule conditions. 

What happens now with the bank statement item?

entry.title: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content:
I have created the List Report by using CDS consumption view(ODATA). When I press GO button with STANDARD variant giving errors why because back end has huge data(approx 12 Lakhs) and trying to load all and giving errors.

Requirement: 1. when i press GO button i want to load few data for STANDARD default variant. OR

                       2. Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button for fiori apps (List Report) created using managed query (CDS views)

Please let me know any hook methods for GO button validation and how to restrict the data to load only few records and display OR Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button pass message like "No items found. Check the search and filter settings." for STANDARD variant  

Thanks

entry.title: PRT availabilty check planned orders
entry.content:
Hey Gurus,

a customer I am currently working with raised the requirement that he wants to be able to check PRT availabilty for planned orders. As far as i know this availabily check is only possible for production orders right? Is there any way to check the PRT availability for planned orders? Their PRTs are maintained in the system as far as i know with a material master.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Transfer of discontinuation data from S/4HANA to ePP/DS
entry.content:
Hello,

does someone know if there is a possibility on S/4Hana 2023 to transfer the discontinuation data from MRP 4 to the embedded PP/DS, that the product interchangeability group is getting created automatically? This has been working with the CIF and APO in the past, can't imagine that this is not possible anymore.

Thanks for your feedback

Andreas

entry.title: How to post parked invoices via BAPI process?
entry.content:
Do we have BAPI For posting Parked Invoice documents (T Code MIRO)?

We need BAPI to Post Parked Invoices & while posting it should allow to Edit field from Invoice


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to open a connection from S4/HANA to other database
entry.content:
how to open a connection from S4/HANA to oracle.

we are in the process to setup s4/HANA and we need to be able:

  1.  to connect from s4/HANA to another database (oracle on premise)
  2. We need to connect from on premise oracle database to s4/HANA

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error Message for Posting Date Outside Scheduled Dates in Process Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need assistance with configuring our SAP system to display an error message when confirming a process order if the posting date is not within the scheduled start and end dates.

We want to ensure that users cannot confirm a process order if the posting date falls outside the scheduled start and end dates of the order by an error message should be triggered during the confirmation process ( using transaction COR6N) if the posting date is not within the scheduled start and end dates.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

SAP S/4HANA MAN Production Planning (PP) SAP Industry Process Framework

entry.title: Template for processing rules for bank statement with action type "Clear in Sequence"
entry.content: Is it possible to get templates for processing rules for clearings? The templates in my system have all the action type "Post to G/L Account".

entry.title: Sales Document Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I created the sales document workflow configuration steps and it says on the creation of sales order "In Approval" status. But couldn't see any orders in My Inbox app for SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

Please throw some lights on what could be wrong.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori

entry.title: Settlement management based on threshold value
entry.content:
Hi,

In settlement management when final settlement happens Business user wanted the settlement document to be created only when the threshold limit is met that is only when the sales volume has reached say 10000 USD, then only the accrual amount can be settled, if the sales volume hasn't reached then settlement should not happen.how this can be achieved?

entry.title: PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION can't post 415Q 412Q 161Q
entry.content: hi,expert I had actived PMMO (under Valuated stock mode) during our production system(we had go-lived for 3 mothons),but some movetypes (such as 415Q,412Q,161Q) are not supported by PMMO, why ? and how can I post this movetype's document ? the follow is a example of the error message about 415Q Transfer between grouped project stock and other stock type is not supported Message No. PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION060 Diagnosis When Project Manufacturing Management and Optimization (PMMO) is active in the system, stock transfer between grouped project stock and other stock types (such as plant stock) is not supported.

entry.title: PMMO can't support 415Q 412Q 161Q movetype
entry.content:
hi,expert I had actived PMMO (under Valuated stock mode) during our production system(we had go-lived for 3 mothons),but some movetypes (such as 415Q,412Q,161Q) are not supported by PMMO, why ? and how can I post this movetype's document ?

the follow is a example of the error message about 415Q

Transfer between grouped project stock and other stock type is not supported Message No. PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION060 Diagnosis When Project Manufacturing Management and Optimization (PMMO) is active in the system, stock transfer between grouped project stock and other stock types (such as plant stock) is not supported.

entry.title: SAP document for SAP ECC to S4HANA(TM, EWM) Integration document
entry.content:

entry.title: Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA TM to Third Party Integration
entry.content:
We need to integrate SAP S/4HANA TM to 3PL(Third Party) & We are looking for Best Practices or any standard SAP document for Integration via CPI or any other helpful steps.

entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am trying to prepare two variants of a report (Manage ** app) and I am having some issues.

I prepare the reports, and I successfully save them as tiles and the tile quick info shows the correct result (6 and 122  - count of returned rows) but when I click on the custom tile the report is defaulted to the general variant.

According to the documentation the functionality should be available: 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_em92/9.2/en-US/71/a972114577451aa29429183ba9b07f/frameset.htm

So my question is: What must I do that when I click on the custom tile SAP will show the relevant data (the 6 or 122 rows as represented in the quick result of the tile)?

Thank you for you help.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Integration IBP S&OP with ePPDS S/4HANA 2024 - General Questions
entry.content:
Dear Community,

i have question regarding the Integration of both System together for Production planning. 

Do you have any BestPractices for the Horizons of the systems?

Which System is doing the main Planning and in which horizon?

Based on your experience is it better to plan the operational horizon in IBP or in ePPDS? If you have pro and cons it would be very helpful for me.

entry.title: TRD0 in standalone SAP TM - SAP EWM and SAP ECC Integration.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently in my project every change on article level is updating delivery in ECC. As it`s retail business one delivery is having a lot of articles causing hundreds of updates of delivery. On SAP TM side we only need updates on the whole delivery status like after Good Issue, not necessary when batch is picked. In current configuration TRD0 output is triggered every time delivery is updated in ECC which is stacking our queues in SAP TM - srt_moni. Any idea how to configure TRD0 better to not get that many updates, by standard ?
